title: antirrhinum maritimum
intro: Antirrhinum maritimum, also known as the seafolly or sea dragon flower, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Antirrhinum maritimum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
